lex.botalias.lambdacodehook.CfnAbout: Specifies a Lambda function that verifies requests to a bot or fulfills the user's request to a bot.

lex.botalias.lambdacodehook.CodeHookInte.Description: The version of the request-response that you want Amazon Lex to use to invoke your Lambda function.

lex.botalias.lambdacodehook.LambdaArn.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lambda function.
